name: Giratina
description: It was banished for its violence. It silently gazed upon the old world from the Distortion World, where knowledge and physics are reversed.
originLore: Banished for violence that threatened creation's ledger, Giratina rules the Distortion World — a mirror realm where physics run in reverse and forgotten truths accumulate.

lore.celestialConcordance: From the Distortion World, Giratina gazes upon the old continuum, ready to invert any law that grows too absolute.

quantumResonators.name: Shadow Force
quantumResonators.description: Phases through dimensional membranes to strike from inverted space.

quantumResonators.name: Antimatter Veil
quantumResonators.description: Cloaks presence inside reversed physical constants.
